should_trigger.prompt: Use Journal Sampling on this Excel journal, map the columns, normalize entries, and select a reproducible audit sample.
required_signals: asks for sample size and sampling method

should_trigger.prompt: Extract sample entries from a print-style Excel export generated from a PDF and ask only for essential mapping ambiguities.
required_signals: reports parser confidence and missing fields

should_not_trigger.prompt: Reconcile this open item list to bank statements and factoring evidence.
Clean this spreadsheet and make the formatting nicer.
